notes: Full monthly series 01/2010-04/2026, all municipios (filter to municipio_id 06182 = Coronel Rosales + neighbors at build time, per D3/D5). Primary coparticipacion source (dataset "transferencias-municipios", CKAN package_search verified).

Per-year XLSX snapshot for December 2023, published by the Ministerio de Hacienda y Finanzas (Dirección Provincial de Coordinación Municipal). Supplementary/cross-check source, not the primary series consumed by build-coparticipacion.

Ejercicio 2022, expediente 3-024.0-2022, fallo dated 14/03/2024. Municipalidad de Coronel de Marina Leonardo Rosales. Scanned PDF, no extractable text layer (pdftotext yields ~0 bytes across 30 pages) -- ficha/metadata-only per htc-fallos spec. Multa de $100.000 al Intendente Municipal Mariano Cecilio USET.

Ejercicio 2023, expediente 3-024.0-2023, fallo dated 13/03/2025. 26 pages, extractable text layer. Multa de $300.000 al Intendente Municipal Mariano Cecilio USET; $300.000 a la Contadora Municipal Patricia Elisabeth BUSTAMANTE; $250.000 al Intendente Municipal Rodrigo Lionel ARISTIMUÑO.

Ejercicio 2024, expediente 3-024.0-2024, fallo dated 09/04/2026. 64 pages, extractable text layer. Multa de $650.000 al Intendente Municipal Rodrigo Lionel ARISTIMUÑO; $500.000 a la Contadora Municipal Patricia Elisabeth BUSTAMANTE. NOTE: filename contains the real-world typo "Leonaardo" (double a) on the source server -- preserved verbatim, not a transcription error on our side.

INDEC IPC Nivel General Nacional, base dic-2016=100, monthly, series-tiempo API. Series id 148.3_INIVELNAL_DICI_M_26 verified at apply-time (2026-07-06) against 3 known published monthly variations: Dec-2023 +25.47% (published ~25.5%), Jan-2024 +20.61% (~20.6%), Feb-2024 +13.24% (~13.2%). start_date pins the capture to Dec-2023 onward per D5; refetch without start_date for full history if ever needed.
